usage: 结构化本地审查素材；不包含参考站原图、音频或完整 HTML。

cards.example: Minecraft is my favorite game.
cards.exampleTranslation: 《我的世界》是我最喜欢的游戏。
cards.sentence: I build a home in a Minecraft world.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在《我的世界》里建造家园。

cards.example: In Survival Mode, you need to find food every day.
cards.exampleTranslation: 在生存模式中，你需要每天寻找食物。
cards.sentence: We play in survival mode together.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们一起在生存模式中游玩。

cards.example: I can build anything I want in Creative Mode.
cards.exampleTranslation: 在创造模式中，我可以建造任何我想要的东西。
cards.sentence: We play in creative mode together.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们一起在创造模式中游玩。

cards.example: Adventure Mode is great for playing story maps.
cards.exampleTranslation: 冒险模式非常适合玩故事地图。
cards.sentence: We play in adventure mode together.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们一起在冒险模式中游玩。

cards.example: In Spectator Mode, you can fly through walls.
cards.exampleTranslation: 在旁观模式中，你可以飞越墙壁。
cards.sentence: We play in spectator mode together.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们一起在旁观模式中游玩。

cards.example: Hardcore Mode is very scary because you only have one life.
cards.exampleTranslation: 极限模式非常可怕，因为你只有一条命。
cards.sentence: We play in hardcore mode together.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们一起在极限模式中游玩。

cards.example: Press E to open your inventory.
cards.exampleTranslation: 按 E 键打开你的物品栏。
cards.sentence: We trade the inventory with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换物品栏。

cards.example: Crafting a pickaxe is the first thing you should do.
cards.exampleTranslation: 制作一把镐子是你应该做的第一件事。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful crafting.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的合成。

cards.example: You need a furnace for smelting iron ore.
cards.exampleTranslation: 你需要一个熔炉来熔炼铁矿石。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful smelting.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的熔炼。

cards.example: Enchanting your sword makes it much stronger.
cards.exampleTranslation: 附魔你的剑会让它更强大。
cards.sentence: The enchanting helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 附魔帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Brewing potions takes time and special ingredients.
cards.exampleTranslation: 酿造药水需要时间和特殊材料。
cards.sentence: The brewing helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 酿造帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Don't worry — you will respawn at your bed.
cards.exampleTranslation: 别担心 — 你会在床上重生。
cards.sentence: The respawn helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 重生帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Monsters spawn in the dark at night.
cards.exampleTranslation: 怪物会在夜晚的黑暗中生成。
cards.sentence: We trade the spawn with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换生成/出生点。

cards.example: A mob is any living creature in Minecraft.
cards.exampleTranslation: 生物是《我的世界》中任何活着的生物。
cards.sentence: The mob follows us along the path.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 生物沿着小路跟着我们。

cards.example: Hostile mobs will attack you on sight.
cards.exampleTranslation: 敌对生物一看到你就会攻击你。
cards.sentence: I keep the hostile in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把敌对的放在背包里。

cards.example: Passive mobs like cows never hurt you.
cards.exampleTranslation: 被动生物比如牛永远不会伤害你。
cards.sentence: The passive helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 被动的帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Wolves are neutral — they only attack when you hit them first.
cards.exampleTranslation: 狼是中立的——只有你先攻击它们时它们才会反击。
cards.sentence: The neutral helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 中立的帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: You get experience by defeating mobs and mining.
cards.exampleTranslation: 击败生物和采矿可以获得经验值。
cards.sentence: I keep the experience (xp) in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把经验值放在背包里。

cards.example: Eat food to keep your health full.
cards.exampleTranslation: 吃食物来保持你的生命值满。
cards.sentence: I keep the health in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把生命值放在背包里。

cards.example: Your hunger bar goes down when you run and fight.
cards.exampleTranslation: 当你奔跑和战斗时，饥饿值会下降。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful hunger.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的饥饿值。

cards.example: A diamond sword does more damage than a wooden one.
cards.exampleTranslation: 钻石剑造成的伤害比木剑更多。
cards.sentence: We trade the damage with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换伤害。

cards.example: This seed creates a world with a big jungle near the start.
cards.exampleTranslation: 这个种子在开始时就生成一个巨大的丛林世界。
cards.sentence: The seed grows well after the rain.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 下雨后世界种子长得很好。

cards.example: Each chunk is a 16x16 section of the world.
cards.exampleTranslation: 每个区块是世界中16x16的区域。
cards.sentence: The chunk helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 区块帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: When you kill a zombie, it drops rotten flesh.
cards.exampleTranslation: 当你杀死僵尸时，它会掉落腐肉。
cards.sentence: The drops helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 掉落物帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: There is great loot inside the dungeon chest.
cards.exampleTranslation: 地下城宝箱里有很棒的战利品。
cards.sentence: I keep the loot in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把战利品放在背包里。

cards.example: You can trade emeralds with villagers for useful items.
cards.exampleTranslation: 你可以用绿宝石和村民交易获得有用的物品。
cards.sentence: We trade the trade with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换交易。

cards.example: Give a wolf bones to tame it as your pet.
cards.exampleTranslation: 给一只狼骨头来驯服它成为你的宠物。
cards.sentence: We trade the tame with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换驯服。

cards.example: Feed two cows wheat to breed them.
cards.exampleTranslation: 喂两头奶牛小麦来繁殖它们。
cards.sentence: I find the breed beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到繁殖。

cards.example: Drink a strength potion before you fight the boss.
cards.exampleTranslation: 在与Boss战斗前喝一个力量药水。
cards.sentence: I keep the potion in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把药水放在背包里。

cards.example: Poison is a bad status effect that hurts you slowly.
cards.exampleTranslation: 中毒是一种会慢慢伤害你的不良状态效果。
cards.sentence: The status effect effect helps me cross the cave.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 状态效果效果帮助我穿过洞穴。

cards.example: Do you know the recipe for a bow?
cards.exampleTranslation: 你知道弓的配方吗？
cards.sentence: We trade the recipe with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换配方。

cards.example: The villager sold me a great enchanted book.
cards.exampleTranslation: 村民卖给了我一本很棒的附魔书。
cards.sentence: A villager is walking near the village.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 一只村民正在村庄附近散步。

cards.example: I got my first achievement when I crafted a workbench.
cards.exampleTranslation: 我合成工作台时获得了我的第一个成就。
cards.sentence: This challenge unlocks the achievement badge.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 这个挑战会解锁“成就”徽章。

cards.example: Everything in Minecraft is made of blocks.
cards.exampleTranslation: Minecraft中的一切都是由方块组成的。
cards.sentence: I collect the block before sunset.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在日落前收集方块。

cards.example: Dirt is the easiest block to dig up.
cards.exampleTranslation: 泥土是最容易挖掘的方块。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful dirt.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的泥土。

cards.example: The grass block on the surface looks green and nice.
cards.exampleTranslation: 地表的草方块看起来绿色又漂亮。
cards.sentence: I collect the grass block before sunset.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在日落前收集草方块。

cards.example: Stone is harder than dirt and very common underground.
cards.exampleTranslation: 石头比泥土更坚硬，在地下非常常见。
cards.sentence: We trade the stone with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换石头。

cards.example: When you mine stone, it turns into cobblestone.
cards.exampleTranslation: 当你挖掘石头时，它会变成圆石。
cards.sentence: I keep the cobblestone in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把圆石放在背包里。

cards.example: Sand falls down when there is no block below it.
cards.exampleTranslation: 当下面没有方块时，沙子会掉落下来。
cards.sentence: The sand helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 沙子帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Gravel also falls like sand, so be careful.
cards.exampleTranslation: 沙砾也会像沙子一样掉落，所以要小心。
cards.sentence: The gravel helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 沙砾帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Chop a log from a tree to get your first wood.
cards.exampleTranslation: 砍一根树上的原木来获得你的第一块木材。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful log.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的原木。

cards.example: Four planks can make a crafting table.
cards.exampleTranslation: 四块木板可以做一个工作台。
cards.sentence: I find the plank beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到木板。

cards.example: Leaves sometimes drop saplings when you break them.
cards.exampleTranslation: 当你破坏树叶时，它们有时会掉落树苗。
cards.sentence: I keep the leaves in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把树叶放在背包里。

cards.example: Plant a sapling and it will grow into a big tree.
cards.exampleTranslation: 种下一棵树苗，它会长成一棵大树。
cards.sentence: We trade the sapling with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换树苗。

cards.example: You cannot break bedrock — it is the bottom of the world.
cards.exampleTranslation: 你不能破坏基岩——它是世界的底部。
cards.sentence: The bedrock helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 基岩帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Obsidian is one of the hardest blocks in the game.
cards.exampleTranslation: 黑曜石是游戏中最坚硬的方块之一。
cards.sentence: The obsidian helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 黑曜石帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Build a window with glass so you can see outside.
cards.exampleTranslation: 用玻璃建一个窗户，这样你就能看到外面。
cards.sentence: We trade the glass with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换玻璃。

cards.example: A slab is only half a block tall.
cards.exampleTranslation: 台阶只有半个方块高。
cards.sentence: We trade the slab with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换台阶。

cards.example: Put stairs on your house so you can walk up easily.
cards.exampleTranslation: 把楼梯放在你的房子上，这样你就可以轻松走上去。
cards.sentence: The stair helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 楼梯帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: A fence keeps your animals inside the farm.
cards.exampleTranslation: 栅栏可以把你的动物留在农场里。
cards.sentence: We trade the fence with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换栅栏。

cards.example: Close the door at night to keep monsters out.
cards.exampleTranslation: 晚上关上门，把怪物挡在外面。
cards.sentence: I keep the door in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把门放在背包里。

cards.example: There is a trapdoor hidden in the floor of the dungeon.
cards.exampleTranslation: 地牢的地板里藏着一扇活板门。
cards.sentence: I keep the trapdoor in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把活板门放在背包里。

cards.example: Put your extra items in a chest to save space.
cards.exampleTranslation: 把多余的物品放进箱子里以节省空间。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful chest.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的箱子。

cards.example: An Ender Chest shares its items across all your worlds.
cards.exampleTranslation: 末影箱会在你所有的世界中共享其中的物品。
cards.sentence: The ender chest is full of new plants to discover.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 末影箱里有许多等待发现的新植物。

cards.example: Place coal in the furnace to smelt iron ore.
cards.exampleTranslation: 把煤放进熔炉来熔炼铁矿石。
cards.sentence: I keep the furnace in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把熔炉放在背包里。

cards.example: You need a crafting table to make most tools and weapons.
cards.exampleTranslation: 你需要工作台来制作大多数工具和武器。
cards.sentence: The crafting table helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 工作台帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Put bookshelves around your enchanting table for better enchants.
cards.exampleTranslation: 把书架放在附魔台周围，可以获得更好的附魔。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful bookshelf.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的书架。

cards.example: Sleep in a bed to set your spawn point and skip the night.
cards.exampleTranslation: 睡在床上可以设置你的出生点并跳过夜晚。
cards.sentence: The bed helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 床帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Watch out — TNT will explode and destroy everything nearby!
cards.exampleTranslation: 小心——TNT 会爆炸并摧毁附近的一切！
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful tnt.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的TNT炸药。

cards.example: A piston pushes blocks when you power it with redstone.
cards.exampleTranslation: 当你用红石给活塞供能时，它会推动方块。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful piston.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的活塞。

cards.example: The dispenser shoots arrows at monsters automatically.
cards.exampleTranslation: 发射器会自动向怪物射出箭矢。
cards.sentence: I keep the dispenser in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把发射器放在背包里。

cards.example: A dropper moves items from one place to another.
cards.exampleTranslation: 投掷器将物品从一个地方移动到另一个地方。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful dropper.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的投掷器。

cards.example: A hopper collects items that fall into it.
cards.exampleTranslation: 漏斗收集掉入其中的物品。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful hopper.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的漏斗。

cards.example: Place a torch on the wall so the cave is bright.
cards.exampleTranslation: 把火把放在墙上，这样洞穴就亮了。
cards.sentence: I find the torch beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到火把。

cards.example: Climb the ladder to reach the top of the tower.
cards.exampleTranslation: 爬上梯子到达塔顶。
cards.sentence: I keep the ladder in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把梯子放在背包里。

cards.example: Lay rail on the ground to build a minecart track.
cards.exampleTranslation: 在地上铺设铁轨以建造矿车轨道。
cards.sentence: I find the rail beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到铁轨。

cards.example: A beacon sends a beam of light into the sky.
cards.exampleTranslation: 信标发出一道光束直射天空。
cards.sentence: The beacon helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 信标帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Use an anvil to repair your broken sword.
cards.exampleTranslation: 使用铁砧修理你的破损剑。
cards.sentence: We trade the anvil with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换铁砧。

cards.example: Fill the cauldron with water to dye your leather armor.
cards.exampleTranslation: 用水装满炼药锅来染色你的皮革盔甲。
cards.sentence: I find the cauldron beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到炼药锅。

cards.example: Sit next to the enchanting table and spend your XP.
cards.exampleTranslation: 坐在附魔台旁边使用你的经验值。
cards.sentence: I find the enchanting table beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到附魔台。

cards.example: You need a blaze rod to build a brewing stand.
cards.exampleTranslation: 你需要烈焰棒来制作酿造台。
cards.sentence: I find the brewing stand beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到酿造台。

cards.example: Glowstone is a bright block that you can find in the Nether.
cards.exampleTranslation: 萤石是一种你可以在下界找到的发光方块。
cards.sentence: We trade the glowstone with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换萤石。

cards.example: Sea lanterns glow underwater and look beautiful.
cards.exampleTranslation: 海晶灯在水下发光，看起来很美丽。
cards.sentence: I keep the sea lantern in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把海晶灯放在背包里。

cards.example: Netherrack covers almost the whole floor of the Nether.
cards.exampleTranslation: 下界岩几乎覆盖了整个下界的地面。
cards.sentence: The netherrack is full of new plants to discover.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 下界岩里有许多等待发现的新植物。

cards.example: Walking on soul sand makes you move very slowly.
cards.exampleTranslation: 行走在灵魂沙上会让你移动得非常缓慢。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful soul sand.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的灵魂沙。

cards.example: End stone is the main block in The End dimension.
cards.exampleTranslation: 末地石是末地维度的主要方块。
cards.sentence: Our map shows a trail through the end stone.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们的地图显示有一条穿过末地石的小路。

cards.example: Terracotta comes in many colors and is great for decoration.
cards.exampleTranslation: 陶瓦有多种颜色，非常适合装饰。
cards.sentence: We trade the terracotta with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换陶瓦。

cards.example: Concrete is stronger than wool and does not burn.
cards.exampleTranslation: 混凝土比羊毛坚固且不会燃烧。
cards.sentence: I keep the concrete in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把混凝土放在背包里。

cards.example: Shear a sheep to get wool for your bed.
cards.exampleTranslation: 剪羊毛可以获得制做床用的羊毛。
cards.sentence: I find the wool beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到羊毛。

cards.example: You can slide very fast on ice blocks.
cards.exampleTranslation: 你可以在冰块上滑得非常快。
cards.sentence: We trade the ice with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换冰。

cards.example: Don't touch the cactus — it hurts you!
cards.exampleTranslation: 不要碰仙人掌——它会伤害你！
cards.sentence: I find the cactus beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到仙人掌。

cards.example: Bamboo grows very tall in the jungle biome.
cards.exampleTranslation: 竹子在丛林生物群系中生长得非常高。
cards.sentence: The bamboo grows well after the rain.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 下雨后竹子长得很好。

cards.example: You can walk across water by stepping on lily pads.
cards.exampleTranslation: 你可以踩在睡莲上走过水面。
cards.sentence: The lily pad helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 睡莲帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: A hay bale reduces fall damage when you land on it.
cards.exampleTranslation: 当你落在干草块上时，它会减少摔落伤害。
cards.sentence: I find the hay bale beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到干草块。

cards.example: Use a sponge to soak up water inside the ocean monument.
cards.exampleTranslation: 在海洋神殿内使用海绵来吸收水。
cards.sentence: We trade the sponge with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换海绵。

cards.example: Mining ore deep underground gives you useful materials.
cards.exampleTranslation: 在地下深处挖矿石会给你有用的材料。
cards.sentence: I find the ore beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到矿石。

cards.example: Coal is the most common ore and a great fuel for your furnace.
cards.exampleTranslation: 煤炭是最常见的矿石，也是你熔炉的好燃料。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful coal.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的煤炭。

cards.example: Smelt iron ore to get iron ingots for tools.
cards.exampleTranslation: 熔炼铁矿石以获得制造工具的铁锭。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful iron.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的铁。

cards.example: Copper turns green over time, just like real copper.
cards.exampleTranslation: 铜随着时间会变绿，就像真实的铜一样。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful copper.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的铜。

cards.example: Gold tools are fast, but they break quickly.
cards.exampleTranslation: 金制工具速度快，但很容易损坏。
cards.sentence: The gold helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 金帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Finding a diamond is the most exciting moment in the game!
cards.exampleTranslation: 找到钻石是游戏中最令人兴奋的时刻！
cards.sentence: We trade the diamond with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换钻石。

cards.example: Trade items with villagers and you will get emeralds.
cards.exampleTranslation: 与村民交易物品，你会得到绿宝石。
cards.sentence: I keep the emerald in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把绿宝石放在背包里。

cards.example: You need lapis lazuli to use the enchanting table.
cards.exampleTranslation: 你需要青金石才能使用附魔台。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful lapis lazuli.

cards.exampleTranslation: 商人羊驼与流浪商人一起旅行。
cards.sentence: We trade the trader llama with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换商人羊驼。

cards.example: A polar bear is calm alone but angry when near its cub.
cards.exampleTranslation: 北极熊单独时很平静，但在幼崽附近时会变得愤怒。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful polar bear.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的北极熊。

cards.example: Build a snow golem to throw snowballs at enemies.
cards.exampleTranslation: 建造一个雪傀儡来向敌人投掷雪球。
cards.sentence: We trade the snow golem with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换雪傀儡。

cards.example: Don't attack zombified piglins — they will all attack you together!
cards.exampleTranslation: 不要攻击僵尸猪灵——它们会一起反击你！
cards.sentence: We watch the zombified piglin from a safe hill.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们从安全的小山上观察僵尸猪灵。

cards.example: The piglin brute always attacks you — gold won't help!
cards.exampleTranslation: 猪灵蛮兵会一直攻击你——给金子也没用！
cards.sentence: A piglin brute is walking near the village.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 一只猪灵蛮兵正在村庄附近散步。

cards.example: A hoglin that enters the Overworld becomes a zoglin.
cards.exampleTranslation: 疣猪兽进入主世界后会变成僵尸疣猪兽。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful zoglin.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的僵尸疣猪兽。

cards.example: Ride a strider across lava lakes in the Nether.
cards.exampleTranslation: 骑着炽足兽穿越下界的岩浆湖。
cards.sentence: We trade the strider with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换炽足兽。

cards.example: An endermite sometimes appears when you throw an ender pearl.
cards.exampleTranslation: 当你投掷末影珍珠时，有时会出现末影螨。
cards.sentence: Our map shows a trail through the endermite.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们的地图显示有一条穿过末影螨的小路。

cards.example: The bogged is a skeleton that shoots poisonous arrows.
cards.exampleTranslation: 泥沼骷髅是一种发射毒箭的骷髅。
cards.sentence: The bogged helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 泥沼骷髅帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: The creaking only moves when you are not looking at it.
cards.exampleTranslation: 嘎吱怪只在你不看它的时候才会移动。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful creaking.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的嘎吱怪。

cards.example: Cure a zombie villager with a potion and a golden apple.
cards.exampleTranslation: 用药水和金苹果治愈一名僵尸村民。
cards.sentence: A zombie villager is walking near the village.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 一只僵尸村民正在村庄附近散步。

cards.example: Cod swim in cold ocean biomes and drop fish when killed.
cards.exampleTranslation: 鳕鱼在寒冷的海洋生物群系中游泳，被击杀时掉落鱼。
cards.sentence: We trade the cod with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换鳕鱼。

cards.example: Salmon jump upstream in rivers — you can catch them!
cards.exampleTranslation: 鲑鱼在河流中逆流而上跳跃——你可以抓住它们！
cards.sentence: I keep the salmon in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把鲑鱼放在背包里。

cards.example: The wandering trader visits you to sell rare plants and items.
cards.exampleTranslation: 流浪商人会来拜访你，出售稀有植物和物品。
cards.phraseTranslation: 一只友好的流浪商人（生物）
cards.sentence: The wandering trader (mob) follows us along the path.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 流浪商人（生物）沿着小路跟着我们。

cards.example: The illusioner makes copies of itself to confuse you.
cards.exampleTranslation: 幻术师会制造自己的复制品来迷惑你。
cards.sentence: I find the illusioner beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到幻术师。

cards.example: The snowy plains biome is covered in white snow all year.
cards.exampleTranslation: 积雪的平原生物群系全年都覆盖着白雪。
cards.sentence: We trade the snowy plains with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换积雪的平原。

cards.example: Huge spikes of packed ice stick up in the ice spikes biome.
cards.exampleTranslation: 在冰刺生物群系中，巨大的致密冰柱向上突出。
cards.sentence: I keep the ice spikes in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把冰刺放在背包里。

cards.example: The flower forest is the most colorful biome in the game.
cards.exampleTranslation: 繁花森林是游戏中最多彩的生物群系。
cards.sentence: We explore the flower forest after breakfast.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们早餐后探索繁花森林。

cards.example: Birch forests have tall white trees with black spots.
cards.exampleTranslation: 白桦林里有高大的带黑色斑点的白色树木。
cards.sentence: The birch forest is full of new plants to discover.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 白桦林里有许多等待发现的新植物。

cards.example: The dark forest is so thick that it is dark even during the day.
cards.exampleTranslation: 黑森林非常茂密，即使在白天也很昏暗。
cards.sentence: We explore the dark forest after breakfast.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们早餐后探索黑森林。

cards.example: Huge bamboo stalks fill the bamboo jungle biome.
cards.exampleTranslation: 巨大的竹子茎秆充满了竹林丛林生物群系。
cards.sentence: The bamboo jungle grows well after the rain.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 下雨后竹林丛林长得很好。

cards.example: Lush caves are underground biomes full of plants and axolotls.
cards.exampleTranslation: 繁茂洞穴是地下生物群系，充满了植物和美西螈。
cards.sentence: Our map shows a trail through the lush caves.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们的地图显示有一条穿过繁茂洞穴的小路。

cards.example: Dripstone caves have sharp stalactites hanging from the ceiling.
cards.exampleTranslation: 滴水石锥洞穴的天花板上悬挂着尖锐的石钟乳。
cards.sentence: Our map shows a trail through the dripstone caves.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们的地图显示有一条穿过滴水石锥洞穴的小路。

cards.example: The meadow biome has flowers and bees and big mountains nearby.
cards.exampleTranslation: 草甸生物群系有鲜花、蜜蜂，附近还有大山。
cards.sentence: We trade the meadow with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换草甸。

cards.example: The grove is a cold snowy biome with spruce trees.
cards.exampleTranslation: 树林是一种寒冷的积雪生物群系，生长着云杉树。
cards.sentence: The grove helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 树林帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Frozen peaks are icy mountain tops covered in packed ice.
cards.exampleTranslation: 冻结的山峰是覆盖着致密冰的冰冷山顶。
cards.sentence: The frozen peaks helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 冻结的山峰帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Warm oceans have colorful coral reefs and tropical fish.
cards.exampleTranslation: 温暖的海洋里有色彩缤纷的珊瑚礁和热带鱼。
cards.sentence: Our map shows a trail through the warm ocean.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们的地图显示有一条穿过温暖的海洋的小路。

cards.example: The deep ocean is very dark and full of surprises below.
cards.exampleTranslation: 深海非常黑暗，深处充满了惊喜。
cards.sentence: We explore the deep ocean after breakfast.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们早餐后探索深海。

cards.example: Sunflower plains always face east — use them as a compass!
cards.exampleTranslation: 向日葵平原上的向日葵总朝向东方——可以把它当指南针！
cards.sentence: The sunflower plains is beautiful today.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 今天的向日葵平原很美。

cards.example: Windswept hills have floating stones that look very strange.
cards.exampleTranslation: 风蚀丘陵有悬浮的石头，看起来非常奇特。
cards.sentence: I keep the windswept hills in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把风蚀丘陵放在背包里。

cards.example: Eroded badlands have tall thin terracotta towers.
cards.exampleTranslation: 侵蚀恶地有高大细长的陶瓦塔柱。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful eroded badlands.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的侵蚀恶地。

cards.example: The pale garden is eerie and filled with white trees.
cards.exampleTranslation: 苍白花园阴森森的，布满了白色的树木。
cards.sentence: The pale garden helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 苍白花园帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Stony peaks are tall mountains made of calcite and stone.
cards.exampleTranslation: 裸岩山峰是由方解石和石头组成的高耸山峰。
cards.sentence: I keep the stony peaks in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把裸岩山峰放在背包里。

cards.example: Frozen oceans have ice blocks floating on the surface.
cards.exampleTranslation: 冻结的海洋表面漂浮着冰块。
cards.sentence: Our map shows a trail through the frozen ocean.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们的地图显示有一条穿过冻结的海洋的小路。

cards.example: Sweeping Edge lets your sword hit many mobs at once.
cards.exampleTranslation: 横扫之刃让你的剑能同时击中多个生物。
cards.sentence: I find the sweeping edge beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到横扫之刃。

cards.example: Fire Protection on your armor makes fire hurt you less.
cards.exampleTranslation: 护甲上的火焰保护可以减少火焰对你造成的伤害。
cards.sentence: The fire protection is beautiful today.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 今天的火焰保护很美。

cards.example: Blast Protection helps you survive creeper explosions.
cards.exampleTranslation: 爆炸保护帮助你在苦力怕的爆炸中存活。
cards.sentence: The blast protection helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 爆炸保护帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: Projectile Protection reduces damage from arrows and fireballs.
cards.exampleTranslation: 弹射物保护减少箭矢和火球对你造成的伤害。
cards.sentence: I keep the projectile protection in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把弹射物保护放在背包里。

cards.example: The Lure enchantment helps you catch fish faster.
cards.exampleTranslation: 诱钓附魔帮助你更快地钓到鱼。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful lure.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的诱钓。

cards.example: Luck of the Sea gives you better items when you fish.
cards.exampleTranslation: 海之眷顾让你钓鱼时能钓到更好的物品。
cards.phrase: get the luck of the sea effect
cards.sentence: The potion gives me the luck of the sea effect.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 药水让我获得海之眷顾效果。

cards.example: Swift Sneak lets you move quickly while sneaking.
cards.exampleTranslation: 迅捷潜行让你在潜行时也能快速移动。
cards.sentence: I find the swift sneak beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到迅捷潜行。

cards.example: Density makes your mace deal more damage when you fall.
cards.exampleTranslation: 密集让你的狼牙棒在坠落攻击时造成更多伤害。
cards.sentence: I find the density beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到密集。

cards.example: Breach on your mace helps break through enemy armor.
cards.exampleTranslation: 狼牙棒上的破甲附魔有助于击穿敌人的护甲。
cards.sentence: I find the breach beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到破甲。

cards.example: Wind Burst launches you into the air after hitting an enemy.
cards.exampleTranslation: 风爆在你击中敌人后会将你弹射到空中。
cards.sentence: I find the wind burst beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到风爆。

cards.example: A ruined portal is a broken Nether portal you can fix.
cards.exampleTranslation: 废墟传送门是一个损坏的下界传送门，你可以修复它。
cards.sentence: We discover the ruined portal beyond the river.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们在河流对岸发现废墟传送门。

cards.example: Pillager outposts are towers where pillagers live.
cards.exampleTranslation: 掠夺者前哨站是掠夺者居住的瞭望塔。
cards.sentence: The pillager outpost helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 掠夺者前哨站帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: An igloo is a snowy house with a secret basement inside.
cards.exampleTranslation: 冰屋是一座雪地小屋，里面有一个秘密地下室。
cards.sentence: We trade the igloo with a friendly villager.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们和友好的村民交换冰屋。

cards.example: Explore a shipwreck underwater to find treasure maps.
cards.exampleTranslation: 探索水下的沉船来找到藏宝图。
cards.sentence: I find the shipwreck beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到沉船。

cards.example: Follow the treasure map to find buried treasure on the beach.
cards.exampleTranslation: 跟随藏宝图在沙滩上找到埋藏的宝藏。
cards.sentence: I find the buried treasure beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到埋藏的宝藏。

cards.example: Amethyst geodes are hollow balls filled with purple crystals.
cards.exampleTranslation: 紫水晶晶洞是充满紫色水晶的空心球体。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful amethyst geode.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的紫水晶晶洞。

cards.example: The Nether Wastes is the most common biome in the Nether.
cards.exampleTranslation: 下界荒地是下界中最常见的生物群系。
cards.sentence: Our map shows a trail through the nether wastes.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们的地图显示有一条穿过下界荒地的小路。

cards.example: The soul sand valley is full of bones and ghostly blue fire.
cards.exampleTranslation: 灵魂沙谷里到处是骨头和幽灵般的蓝色火焰。
cards.sentence: I find the soul sand valley beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到灵魂沙谷。

cards.example: The crimson forest is a red mushroom forest in the Nether.
cards.exampleTranslation: 绯红森林是下界中一片红色蘑菇森林。
cards.sentence: Our map shows a trail through the crimson forest.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们的地图显示有一条穿过绯红森林的小路。

cards.example: The warped forest is blue and surprisingly safe in the Nether.
cards.exampleTranslation: 诡异森林是蓝色的，在下界中出奇地安全。
cards.sentence: We explore the warped forest after breakfast.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们早餐后探索诡异森林。

cards.example: Basalt deltas are full of black columns and white ash.
cards.exampleTranslation: 玄武岩三角洲充满了黑色柱子和白色灰烬。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful basalt deltas.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的玄武岩三角洲。

cards.example: Fossils are bone structures buried underground in deserts.
cards.exampleTranslation: 化石是埋藏在沙漠地下的骨头结构。
cards.sentence: The fossil helps us prepare for the journey.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 化石帮助我们为旅程做准备。

cards.example: A witch lives in the swamp hut and brews powerful potions.
cards.exampleTranslation: 女巫住在沼泽小屋里，酿造强力药水。
cards.sentence: I find the swamp hut beside the campfire.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我在篝火旁找到沼泽小屋。

cards.example: A small desert well is a rare find in the middle of nowhere.
cards.exampleTranslation: 一口小小的沙漠水井是荒野中的罕见发现。
cards.sentence: We explore the desert well after breakfast.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我们早餐后探索沙漠水井。

cards.example: A trial spawner sends waves of mobs to fight you.
cards.exampleTranslation: 试炼刷怪笼会生成一波又一波的生物来与你战斗。
cards.sentence: The chest contains a useful trial spawner.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 箱子里有一个有用的试炼刷怪笼。

cards.example: Open a vault with a trial key to get your reward.
cards.exampleTranslation: 用试炼钥匙打开金库来获取你的奖励。
cards.sentence: I keep the vault in my backpack.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 我把金库放在背包里。
